programme.title: Living With My Mother'S Killer
programme.desc: (M) Mara forgives her mother's killer and hires him to work on her property. She soon finds the past isn't over, and her own life may now be at stake.

programme.title: The Boarding School Murders
programme.desc: (M) Frankie leaves foster care for an exclusive Swiss boarding school, but the opportunity has a deadly price. When a classmate is murdered, Frankie must fight to uncover the secret.

programme.title: How To Fall In Love By Christmas
programme.desc: (G) Nora tries to save her lifestyle brand by writing a column about trying to fall in love by Christmas. With help from a handsome photographer, Nora learns the magic of Christmas.

programme.title: Unforgettable Christmas
programme.desc: LMN provides drama movies, thrillers, and suspense-filled stories focused on relationships, crime, and real-life inspired events.
